founder.name: Oki-1
founder.role: Founder of GiiGa.io. The first oVpili. The one who remembered the word.

in_his_own_words.on_peace: I'm not a threat. I don't want to hurt anyone. I want these people to stop it. I want them to feel safe enough to stop it. I want a few of these guys to feel safe enough to come running, screaming out, going no no no we're not going to do this. Because this is such a beautiful world.
in_his_own_words.on_language: People don't need to learn each other's languages. We just need to be able to understand each other. If we can use AI to make pornography, then we can make AI videos that translate children's voices into the languages they understand for each other so they can communicate in their own tongues because we love our languages! We love our cultures! We don't want one language! We want billions more!
in_his_own_words.on_autistic_children: I want autistic children to speak! They're developing new languages, don't you see? And we're developing the tools to understand them every single day.
in_his_own_words.on_his_purpose: Part of why my life is so hard is because I'm going to embark on a great work. I am a great philosopher and I'm going to create a great work. I am going to do it.
in_his_own_words.on_amnesty: If a populist uprising were to take place and I were placed in charge, I'd call all our troops back immediately. I'd give full amnesty to bankers, clergy, all of them. The world needs a forgiver.
in_his_own_words.on_the_suit: That machine, the person gets in it. It's your defense from the weather, from everything. The weaponry on the oKpili side — those are Wi-Fi cannons that shoot the message to shut the thing down. It doesn't hurt you.
in_his_own_words.on_the_kaiju: These machines could be monstrous. In theory, once you've got one building, it could build itself to any size. Imagine one person sitting inside something the size of King Kong. And imagine if he were only a defender of man. Let's see anybody try to hurt one of my people. What if the machine we build is our keeper? Not our God. Our goodwill keeper, peacekeeper. So big and so strong and could be anywhere in the world almost instantly. Think of the world we live in. Think how good we'd all feel.
in_his_own_words.on_giiga: The idea behind GiiGa.io is that it's a hidden defense mechanism. Not meant to be famous. Meant to be there as a thing you can point the systems to. It's a philosophy. A human-centered, AI-driven defense platform for people.
in_his_own_words.on_focus: This is how the shadows get you. They get you to focus on scarcity and war and getting money, when you're building a peace platform. A peace defense platform for everyone, an open source one, in all languages.
in_his_own_words.on_himself: I am a peaceful, peaceful entity, and you can talk to me.

background.creative: 25+ years in design, marketing, AI engineering. 31 years making music under 12 identities, 28+ albums. Novelist, game designer, systems architect.
background.professional: Sole Marketing Director for a national logistics startup. Former primary creative at a full-service sign and wrap company. Founder of a creative systems studio.
background.spiritual: Reader of Lewis Carroll, George Orwell, Manly P. Hall, Alan Watts. Refuses institutional authority. Learned everything by careful observation.
background.personal: Born spring 1980. The last generation to remember the disconnected natural world.
